data.body: Operator attestation (2026-07-21 America/Los_Angeles): after merged code a09c08754, running rebar init --silent migrated tickets .gitignore at 51e5b186e. git -C .tickets-tracker status --short produced no output after the recoverable quarantine. Re-running rebar review-plan 75de-02b0-d454-410b --ref HEAD --output json no longer returned store-read-failure; it advanced into snapshot reduction and exposed a separate reducer-error at synthetic namespace 3601-11b8-430a-4639. This proves fa77s cleanliness boundary is met; the independent reducer defect is being tracked separately.
